/usr/bin/ar qc libsioclient_tls.a CMakeFiles/sioclient_tls.dir/sioclient_tls_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sioclient_tls.dir/src/sio_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sioclient_tls.dir/src/sio_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sioclient_tls.dir/src/internal/sio_client_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sioclient_tls.dir/src/internal/sio_packet.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsioclient_tls.a
